phases.title: Discovery
phases.goal: Confirm the project outcome, user, success measures, constraints, and non-goals.

gates.label: The target user or audience is confirmed.
Important time, cost, platform, and technical constraints are recorded.

phases.title: Validation
phases.goal: Test the riskiest assumption with the smallest credible artifact.

gates.label: The smallest build scope and its non-goals are approved.

phases.title: Build
phases.goal: Deliver approved vertical slices and verify their outcomes.

gates.label: The approved milestone work is complete.
Relevant automated or manual checks pass.
Acceptance evidence matches the approved outcome.

phases.title: Release
phases.goal: Prepare a reversible, observable release and obtain approval.

gates.label: Rollback or recovery is documented and credible.

phases.title: Operate
phases.goal: Observe real use and choose the next outcome from evidence.

gates.label: Real usage or feedback evidence is summarized.
The next outcome or hypothesis is approved.
